name: This Afternoon
detailedForecast: A chance of thunderstorms and a chance of rain and patchy fog before 5pm, then rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a high near 60. South wind around 16 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
